nasb.text: So the Asherites lived among the Canaanites, the inhabitants of the land; for they did not drive them out.

esv.text: so the Asherites lived among the Canaanites, the inhabitants of the land, for they did not drive them out.

cnv.text: 於是亞設人住在當地的居民迦南人中間，因為他們沒有把他們趕走。

ccb.text: 于是亚设人住在这些迦南人当中。
